name: Umm Khalaf
title: Wife of Muslim ibn Awsaja
shortDescription: The devoted wife of Muslim ibn Awsaja who, after her husband's martyrdom in Karbala, sent her son to the battlefield to be martyred.
fullStory:
Umm Khalaf was the pious and brave wife of Muslim ibn Awsaja (one of the great companions of the Prophet and Imam Ali). She was present in Imam Hussain's (AS) caravan along with her husband and son.

When Muslim ibn Awsaja fell to the ground and was martyred as one of the first martyrs of Ashura, Umm Khalaf not only did not lament despairingly, but strengthened her resolve to help the Imam.

She called her son, Khalaf ibn Muslim, and encouraged him to go to the battlefield. In some Maqatil (historical accounts), it is mentioned that Imam Hussain (AS) told Khalaf: 'If you are killed, your mother will be left alone.' But Umm Khalaf said to the Imam: 'I myself commanded him to fight!'

Khalaf went to the battlefield and was martyred after a manifest fight. They also severed his head and threw it towards his mother. Umm Khalaf embraced her son's head and thanked God for this blessing and honor.
quoteArabic: يا بُنَيَّ! لا أَرْضى عَنْكَ حَتّى تُقْتَلَ بَيْنَ يَدَيِ ابْنِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ...
quote: (Addressing her son:) My son! I will not be pleased with you unless you are killed in front of the Messenger of God's son!
